description: DigiRig Mobile USB audio and CAT interface

audio_settings.alc_guidance: Watch ALC meter during TX. Adjust until stable power output.

description: Xiegu X6100 with built-in USB audio and CAT control

audio_settings.alc_guidance: Xiegu ALC is REVERSED: high ALC (90-100) = good. Adjust until ALC reads 90-100.
audio_settings.radio_rx_menu: Set RX audio output in radio menu to 50%

description: Icom IC-705 — portable SDR-based transceiver with built-in USB audio and CI-V CAT control. HF/VHF/UHF. Excellent for ARDOP FM on VHF/UHF.

audio_settings.alc_guidance: Monitor ALC on radio display. Reduce TX level until ALC reads zero or minimal.

description: Icom IC-9700 — VHF/UHF/SHF base station with built-in USB audio and CI-V CAT control. Ideal for ARDOP FM on 2m, 70cm, and 23cm.

audio_settings.alc_guidance: Monitor ALC on radio display. Reduce TX level until ALC reads zero or minimal.

description: Icom IC-7300 — popular HF/6m SDR-based transceiver with built-in USB audio and CI-V CAT control.

audio_settings.alc_guidance: Monitor ALC on radio display. Reduce TX level until ALC reads zero or minimal.

description: Xiegu G90 — portable HF transceiver. Requires external USB audio interface (DigiRig recommended). CI-V CAT PTT.

audio_settings.alc_guidance: Monitor ALC on radio display. Reduce TX level until ALC reads minimal.
